title: Delhi High Court questions blanket ban on protests in Delhi University but denies interim stay
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday questioned the orders issued by Delhi University (DU) and the Delhi Police, which imposed a blanket ban on protests at the University. A Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia orally remarked that there cannot be a blanket ban on protests, demonstrations and processions. The Bench said that if there are any violations of law and order, it is for the police to take action, but a total prohibition may not be correct. "We ar
